mapper.sql: id, template_name, trigger_scene, subject, status, create_time, update_time, note
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from sms_email_template
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from sms_email_template
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LASTVAL()
insert into sms_email_template (template_name, trigger_scene, email_subject, status, create_time, update_time, note, email_content) values (#{templateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{triggerScene,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{emailSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

SELECT LASTVAL()
insert into sms_email_template
template_name,
trigger_scene,
subject,
status,
create_time,
update_time,
note,
content,
#{templateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{triggerScene,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update sms_email_template
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
template_name = #{record.templateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trigger_scene = #{record.triggerScene,jdbcType=INTEGER},
subject = #{record.subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
note = #{record.note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{record.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update sms_email_template set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, template_name = #{record.templateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_scene = #{record.triggerScene,jdbcType=INTEGER}, subject = #{record.subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, note = #{record.note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{record.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update sms_email_template set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, template_name = #{record.templateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_scene = #{record.triggerScene,jdbcType=INTEGER}, subject = #{record.subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, note = #{record.note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update sms_email_template
template_name = #{templateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trigger_scene = #{triggerScene,jdbcType=INTEGER},
subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sms_email_template set template_name = #{templateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_scene = #{triggerScene,jdbcType=INTEGER}, subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sms_email_template set template_name = #{templateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trigger_scene = #{triggerScene,jdbcType=INTEGER}, subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM sms_email_template
1=1
AND template_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{templateName}, '%')
AND trigger_scene = #{triggerScene}
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT ,
FROM sms_email_template WHERE trigger_scene = #{triggerScene} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
